en: Good evening. I'm Caitlin Collins. Despite repeated offers from the Harris campaign,
Donald Trump has officially refused to appear in another debate saying, quote, it's not
because I'm scared, so don't tell people I'm scared. However, there was one format in which
ko: 다른 토론에 대해 "나는 두려워서가 아니다. 그러니 사람들이 내가 두려워한다고 말하지 마라"라고 말했습니다.

en: President Trump was willing to face off against Harris. We take you live to that now.
It's time for Family Feud Election Showdown. Here's your host, Steve Harvey.
Okay. Okay, now. All right. Welcome to Family Feud Election Edition. I am Steve Harvey,
ko: 자, 이제 환영합니다. 가족 대결 선거 특별판입니다.

en: and I have spent the past 20 years hosting every show on TV as my alibi for them ditty parties.
ko: 자, 이제 오늘 밤, 두 정치적 라이벌이 있습니다.

en: All right. Now, tonight, we got two political rivals. On this side is the Democrats led
ko: 이쪽은 부통령 카말라 해리스를 이끄는 민주당입니다.
이쪽은 카말라 해리스 부통령이 이끄는 민주당입니다.
